emails.subject: Hess Guaranty
emails.body: Hess Guaranty Brant, Attached is a clean and redlined guaranty with the changes we agreed upon. We still need Hess' address for the notice section. Sorry about the delay.

emails.subject: Re: Hess Guaranty
emails.body: Re: Hess Guaranty I would have just filled this in, but I wanted to make sure their are no other matters that need further attention. Let me know when this is ready. thanks for your help. Notice Information: Hess Energy Trading Company 1185 Avenue of the Americas New York, New York 10036 Att: Dana Dellacona Brant.
